title: Egghead Falls Under Siege
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Vegapunk, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Luffy, Sentomaru, Unknown person #3 as CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.
scene: CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're meant to be with the marines, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why the hell is a government weapon getting in our way?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You'll pay for hurting our men!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The ultimate defense invented by vegapunk!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Surrender and proceed with me to factory B!!

dialogue.speaker: Sentomaru
dialogue.text: This must be a mark III Pacifista!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's far more advanced than the prototypes used in the summit war!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everyone, do what it says if you don't want to die!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Pacific don't act on their own like this!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huff. Huff. Some day off this turned out to be..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Are the Pacific doing their job?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: And I can't even get a hold...

summary: This part advances the Egghead Under Siege through 26 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
